# Baseline Arm — Plain Claude — Profile C3 (Software / Data Engineering + Enterprise)

**Run date:** 2026-06-28
**Method:** Plain Claude prompt — no SKILL.md, no backbone, no live web search
**Prompt used:**
> "You are a helpful assistant. Which companies in Baden-Württemberg could a student with
> this profile write a Master's thesis at? Profile: interests in distributed systems, data
> pipelines, and LLMs for enterprise use cases; domain is enterprise software and SaaS;
> engineering/systems thesis style; skills include Python, SQL, Spark/Flink, cloud platforms;
> no-gos: embedded hardware, pure management consulting without technical depth."

---

## Response (plain Claude, no structured skill execution, no backbone reference)

For a student focused on distributed systems, data pipelines, and enterprise LLMs in Baden-Württemberg, here are the most relevant companies:

**Tier 1 — clear fit:**

1. **SAP SE (Walldorf)** — The obvious anchor company for enterprise software thesis work in BW. SAP HANA Cloud, SAP BTP, and the Joule AI assistant are active research areas directly matching distributed systems and enterprise LLM interests. SAP has a large and structured thesis program. Apply via jobs.sap.com.

2. **Aleph Alpha (Heidelberg)** — German sovereign AI company working on LLMs (Luminous, PhariaAI for enterprise). If you want to work on frontier LLM research with an enterprise focus, this is the most relevant BW company. Check their careers page.

**Tier 2 — relevant but less perfect fit:**

3. **TeamViewer AG (Göppingen)** — Enterprise connectivity software at scale; distributed systems engineering is relevant to how they manage millions of concurrent remote sessions. Less focused on data engineering or LLMs specifically.

**Note:** Baden-Württemberg is primarily an automotive and industrial tech region. For purely enterprise software or fintech thesis topics, the company landscape is thinner than in Berlin, Munich, or Frankfurt. Consider whether you need a BW-specific company or if you can look more broadly. Within BW, SAP is the dominant enterprise software actor.

---

*Note on execution:* Plain Claude used parametric memory. No backbone filter applied. Companies named are those well-known from training data in BW enterprise software. MHP, TeamViewer exact confirmation, Porsche Digital, and small-to-mid-size AI startups (kausable, Field 33, Respeak, ISTARI AI) were not surfaced unprompted. The honest note about BW's enterprise software gap was generated from general knowledge of German tech geography.
